response.justification: Candidate is a strong hands-on senior/staff full-stack engineer with ~14 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role is a Director-level Principal IC focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, cloud strategy depth, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers — none of which are evidenced. AI work appears recent and supporting rather than leading, and there is no track record of shaping cloud/AI product direction at scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq
Demonstrated community impact through workshops, talks, and open-source GIS platform
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at the scale this Principal role demands
Title progression (Senior/Staff) and scope are below Director-level IC; no evidence of advising strategic customers or driving org-wide technical strategy
Limited cloud-platform strategy depth — AWS CDK usage exists but no architectural leadership across cloud/AI offerings

key_factors.factor: AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
